text.title: Journey Mapping Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is exactly one named persona + explicit start + end point present in scope?
Is cited research evidence (interview/ticket/analytics ids) reachable for at least 50% of cells?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce the eight-component matrix; mark empty cells 'no data' and validate.
defer; without research a map is false consensus. Route to user-interviews or usability-testing first.
block; split into separate maps per persona before any further work.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → one named persona + endpoints → research evidence reachable → produce the matrix per rule r1-eight-components and validate.
